title: Making a Safe Film Scene
article_text: The writer planned a new scene for the film. She wanted to mix different elements to make it more interesting. The content of the scene was about a medical emergency. She invited a doctor to give advice on how to handle the situation correctly. The director was aware that safety must come first to prevent accidents. He asked the committee to check every glass and telephone on the set. The team used a copy of the script to follow the story. They admitted that some parts were difficult to beat. The actor moved carefully so he could not break the glass. The final scene was effective because everyone worked together.

sentences.en: The writer planned a new scene for the film.
sentences.zh: 作家为电影计划了一个新场景。

words.eng_def: a person who writes books, articles, etc.
a part of a play or film

sentences.en: She wanted to mix different elements to make it more interesting.
sentences.zh: 她想混合不同的元素，让它更有趣。

sentences.en: The content of the scene was about a medical emergency.
sentences.zh: 场景的内容是关于一个医疗紧急情况。

words.eng_def: the things that are inside something

sentences.en: She invited a doctor to give advice on how to handle the situation correctly.
sentences.zh: 她邀请了一位医生就如何正确处理情况提供建议。

words.eng_def: an opinion about what to do

sentences.en: The director was aware that safety must come first to prevent accidents.
sentences.zh: 导演意识到安全必须放在第一位，以防止事故。

sentences.en: He asked the committee to check every glass and telephone on the set.
sentences.zh: 他要求委员会检查片场的每一个玻璃杯和电话。

words.eng_def: a group of people who make decisions
a hard, clear material used for windows and bottles
a device used to talk to someone far away

sentences.en: The team used a copy of the script to follow the story.
sentences.zh: 团队使用剧本副本跟随故事。

words.eng_def: something that looks like another thing

sentences.en: They admitted that some parts were difficult to beat.
sentences.zh: 他们承认有些部分很难超越。

words.eng_def: to win against someone or do better than

sentences.en: The actor moved carefully so he could not break the glass.
sentences.zh: 演员小心移动，这样他就不会打破玻璃杯。

words.eng_def: a hard, clear material used for windows and bottles

sentences.en: The final scene was effective because everyone worked together.
sentences.zh: 最后一个场景很有效果，因为每个人都一起合作。

words.eng_def: working well and getting the result you want

vocabulary.eng_def: to put different things together

vocabulary.eng_def: working well and getting the result you want

vocabulary.eng_def: right or true

vocabulary.eng_def: relating to medicine or doctors

vocabulary.eng_def: to say that something is true

vocabulary.eng_def: to win against someone or do better than

vocabulary.eng_def: something that looks like another thing

vocabulary.eng_def: knowing that something exists

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to stop something from happening'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是'有效的'？

quiz.question_en: Which word means 'an opinion about what to do'?
Which word means 'to deal with something'?

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是'意识到'？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'knowing that something exists'?

image_prompts: A writer sitting at a desk planning a film scene with a notebook.
A woman mixing colorful elements like paint and paper on a table.
A scene showing a medical emergency with a doctor helping a patient.
A doctor giving advice to a group of film crew members.
A director pointing at safety signs on a film set.
A committee of people checking glass cups and a telephone on a table.
A team holding a copy of a script and reading it together.
Two people talking, one admitting a mistake with a sad face.
An actor walking carefully near a table with a glass on it.
A final film scene with everyone smiling and working together.
